title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: How has the food culture in your country changed in recent years?
Do you enjoy trying food from other countries? What's your favourite?
How often do you eat out? What kind of restaurants do you like?
Do you think it's important to preserve traditional recipes and food culture?
Do you think it's possible to eat healthily without spending a lot of money?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think globalisation is good or bad for local food cultures?
Should supermarkets do more to promote locally produced food?
Is it important for young people to know how to cook traditional dishes?
